description_long: This is a low-cut, black leather boat shoe with a moc-toe design and brown rubber lugged sole. The upper features visible white stitching along the toe and sides, with metallic eyelets and brown leather laces threaded through them in a classic criss-cross style. The shoe has a padded collar for comfort and a reinforced heel with additional stitching for durability. The sides display characteristic boat shoe lacing that runs through metal eyelets, adding both style and function. The sole is thick, rugged, and brown, providing traction suitable for urban environments. The overall appearance is clean, structured, and well-crafted, with no visible branding or logos.
description: A black leather boat shoe with brown laces, white stitching, and a rugged brown sole. Features metallic eyelets and a moc-toe design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded collar, reinforced heel, and visible stitching details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the moc-toe stitching, side lacing, and lugged brown sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the criss-cross lacing, toe stitching, and rounded toe box.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side lacing, stitching, and rugged sole.
